name: Q&A
subject: What's your question for Paul Ryan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
****

Friend,

**Last night** \-- Paul Ryan joined Martha MacCallum and Bret Baier for a live Town Hall about tax reform.

Take a look at some of the highlights (abridged) below then let us know if you have a question that wasn't brought up >>

**Question on tax cuts for everyone** : One of the points of contention are scenarios where some taxpayers say there's not a tax cut in this for everybody. One of those scenarios was written up in _The Washington Post. _In Atlanta, Georgia, a couple, the husband is a police officer. The wife is a tax manager. They have $180,000 combined income. Mortgage, three kids, day care, college. They say in that scenario some are going to end up paying more. What do you say?

**Paul 's answer:** I have a hard time believing that particular scenario. The analysis is clear. **This tax bill for the average taxpayer in every income group gets a tax cut.** I'm sure there are going to be people out there, higher income people who can hire an accountant or a tax lawyer to utilize a bunch of loopholes in the current tax code -- and by losing some of those loopholes, they may not be as well off. _**But the whole purpose of this is to take away those loopholes, so you can lower everybody's tax rates across the board**_. _**The whole purpose of this is to take away loopholes and give everybody a general tax cut. **_

**Question on small businesses** : If your taxes for your business are going through your personal income tax, then if you are making a certain amount -- you will pay taxes higher than that. The issue we have is we need that money for capital, for growth, and then at the end of the year we have to pull money out of the business as a bonus, or into your payroll just to pay the taxes for the company. Then we turn around and pay taxes on the tax money we're spending. How is the new tax plan going to fix this?

**Paul 's answer: **A great question. There's two basic kinds of businesses in America. The big corporations like AT&T that are 20% of American businesses. Then 80% of American businesses are what we call pass-throughs, like you just described. They pay their taxes on the individual side of the tax code so today that top effective tax rate is their tax rate. That's why I say successful small businesses are paying over 40% because the income tax rates go above 40% in America. _**What we are trying to do is make sure that business income gets there tax rate down to 25%.** _****

Did you have a question that wasn't covered?**** Let us know: [**https://action.speakerryan.com/ryan-town-hall**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzE2NDM3NzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MjAyODc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Looking forward to hearing from you,

Team Ryan

| [Submit your question >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzE2NDM3NzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MjAyODc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Washington, D.C. 20003

The GOP tax plan is nothing more than a scam -- not only will it RAISE taxes and health care costs for middle class Americans but it will give a tax break to those who need it less -- the ultra-wealthy and big corporations.
---

[**Add your name to stand against the GOP tax scam >>**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d319/2b07114c/cbe66abf/73171f98/1542420512/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171115-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")
Team --

Republicans are calling this tax plan a better plan for working Americans, but the reality is quite different -- **their plan is a scam.**

**In fact, last night, Senate Republicans made a HUGE change to their tax plan** \-- it will repeal the individual mandate required by Obamacare, a back-door maneuver to gut the Affordable Care Act and raise health care costs for working families.

That's _in addition_ to the fact that this plan would raise taxes for middle-class Americans while the top 1% and big corporations get a HUGE tax break.

[**Team, show the GOP there will be consequences for supporting this sham of a tax plan. Add your name to stand with our Senate Democrats against the GOP tax scam >>**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d319/2b07114c/cbe66abf/73171f98/1542420512/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171115-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

If you're someone who uses the **state tax deduction** on your taxes, the GOP's plan will raise your taxes.

If you're someone who takes the **student loan interest deduction** , the GOP's plan will raise your taxes.

If you are a **homeowner** , well, you guessed it, the GOP's tax plan could potentially raise your taxes too.

Meanwhile...our deficit would skyrocket. We can't just stand by and let this happen.

**Senate Democrats are standing up to the GOP and demanding a plan that will help, not hurt, the middle class. Add your name to stand with them and call out the GOP tax scam:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/stop-the-gop-tax-scam**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d319/2b07114c/cbe66abf/73171f98/1542420512/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171115-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

subject: FWD: Time to listen

body:
We wanted to make sure you had the opportunity to take the survey. |
---
| | | | | | |

Peter,

President Trump wants to hear what real Americans have to say about where our country is going... But we noticed we haven't heard from you yet.

Our survey, **Listening to America** , is a critical tool to ensure real American voices are heard and the Administration is putting the priorities of those voices **_first_**.

**[We wanted to make sure you had the opportunity to take the survey before it ends.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4ced38f423960c88fd73aa0adf4640678b5e3e8f7420bb33581e68a114587dd85e89227ec259f5fce121e5c4c11657018bef9d4c7b0064d)**

---
**2017 LISTENING TO AMERICA SURVEY RECORD** **Account Name:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4ced38f423960c8afb09af2234d711fe47d212f05bd899518e62306ac90af14bffa0322167b43b6b5e5db1e3ee18f682078370f1b4be14c)** **Election Anniversary Response:** **PENDING** **Surveys Taken:** 306,144 **[**TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4ced38f423960c87a9dc383a6226143f9ed4e3b4548e097feabdc8a0b6398b1bce79a446356ee5fe935c7a74b1acadfe8201e5484ff9e6b)**
---

We've got to turn off the noise of Washington and get real feedback from the American people, just like you. **[Take the survey now to ensure the President knows your thoughts, Peter.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4ced38f423960c8179d41bb5e1c8acf61e1980d6d0126b3ea7988b515ffef84d447161c1aa3990ff8cfb848cd5c2b85bbab7b74e06a1318)**

Thank you,

Team TRUMP
[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4ced38f423960c8abcd9d1743f0fb9275801b5a9bc7475b65d989d246a8ee69c8b9fec6647fa0952c2648c5c12d90dc912e5744b1d6b2c8)

**\---------- Forwarded Message ----------**
**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Date:** November 14, 2017
**Subject:** Time to listen
**To:** **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4ced38f423960c8bd31c62564ee8cb8db3925fc6dae760b45f2dc4b7ff9e40045d34b382956904e99673f73d5ea89b8e5372c813941b635)**

---
Peter,

Politicians have spent too much time bickering and not enough time listening. So today we're turning off that awful, blistering noise of Washington.

Instead, I want to hear from YOU.

I want to hear from the American heartland -- the REAL America that lives outside of the DC-media fantasy world.

**[Now that we've passed the one-year mark since our historic election, I want you to take the Listening to America Survey to tell me the true sentiments, concerns, and interests of REAL America.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4ced38f423960c8b42cbe3701c17191dac361d67f0d5277472393f58b1d2325a3a9607592431bba3386e70ea05f4ff3b3acd019c5d7e872)**
---
The mainstream media and Hollywood dominate the airwaves and drown out the voices of the real hardworking Americans who make our country run.

They love to tell _you_ how _you_ feel. Enough!

**The only person that can speak for you is YOU.**

Just like on the campaign, I always like to go directly to the people. I asked our supporters to help prepare for our three big debates against Hillary. I asked what issues we should address. I asked for help creating our platform. And I take our message straight to you through emails and social media.

**[So please take this moment to turn off the very loud noise of Washington and take the Listening to America Survey.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4ced38f423960c82a9428a8aa93278034381c3c0a2c2d7c17b44c05b0ce7a8a646739d855e499f8890918f2b3e1a8fa4564423f4caa0ad7)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4ced38f423960c8a4c1469c6328ba05520a616681e873fd46ff4cbd0ebe893f341cd1993b60fb1f395223ea6965354bbc45e9d544816732)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

name: The White House
subject: Promoting International Peace and Security
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=47d2a952ace876e9f4718e744406f5c6f42d9edc3c58d1f2ba715d4c602bce98833e8e6e6242d83fc831c8125fbc6eb55caac4bcb56f8dde

Tax Reform that Makes Numbers Move

Today, President Donald J. Trump will be at the U.S. Capitol to talk America First tax reform with the House Republican Conference. The President’s priorities have been consistent: cutting tax rates for middle-income families, simplifying the tax code, and slashing the corporate tax rate to promote job growth and bring overseas profits back to the U.S. economy. Pay raises from these tax cuts could put around $5,000 back in American pockets, allowing more hardworking American families to enjoy financial prosperity and peace of mind. Dramatic tax cuts, massive job creation, and competitive American business are at the heart of America First tax reform.
Read more at
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=47d2a952ace876e988a7e6ca477d54aa517570431dbcfd3030f8ca8db33a2fd8a22cc5bebf4065418553211adb730484c796872e5f9be2b8
whitehouse.gov/taxreform.

Growing America’s Global Relationships in Asia

During President Trump’s recent historical trip to Asia, he made tremendous efforts to invest in American workers, encourage fair and reciprocal trade, generate unified resolve to denuclearize North Korea, promote a free and open Indo-Pacific region, and express the United States’ commitment to Asia.

“I'm here to advance peace, to promote security, and to work with you to achieve a truly free and open Indo-Pacific, where we are proud and we have sovereign nations, and we thrive, and everybody wants to prosper,” President Trump said of his trip.

In China, South Korea, and Vietnam, new trade and investment deals were announced that will create jobs for American workers, increase American exports, and stimulate investments in American communities. President Trump underscored the importance of rebalancing bilateral economic relationships with all countries he visited, advancing fair trade and working towards ending years of unbalanced trade that has left too many Americans behind. Additionally, President Trump called upon all responsible nations to work to compel the North Korean regime to denuclearize and strengthened existing relations with Asian nations that will propel regional development and prosperity.

Read more about the strides President Trump made towards global prosperity
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=47d2a952ace876e9d876476f4eeb35c579f7a030876b4220228d98906031b63a4b575dde9eb43f1d15aeb9d5fc24f2ab9d0b9436aab0c373
here.

Continuing Relief and Recovery in Texas

Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence visited Austin, Texas, on Wednesday to receive a briefing on Hurricane Harvey disaster relief and recovery efforts at the FEMA Joint Field Office. The Vice President thanked the hard-working men and women of FEMA and emergency responders for their dedication and he made clear that the Administration has made the full resources of the federal government available to the people of Texas during the recovery. He was joined by Governor Greg Abbott, Secretary of Energy Rick Perry, and FEMA Administrator Brock Long.

See more
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=47d2a952ace876e9c79054ff38a772b6016fe6d8966f27bf35412c51a32fe870e82ce8da176255746d1f0c75ed706c8fc4eb80103b9e54c2
here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump visits Vietnam | November 11, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

In the morning, President Donald J. Trump traveled to the U.S. Capitol, where he delivered remarks on tax reform to the House Republican Conference.

Tonight, the Vice President will speak at the Tax Foundation's annual dinner at the National Building Museum in Washington, D.C.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=47d2a952ace876e90a60eeadd003f551788473cc9d9322301a35380e8092d25b6efbd57d443d65729f8afb800b31da959d5a7dd19fcf2097
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=47d2a952ace876e99a28d4bb4759a43d3d3862016014ce087a4f11bb20bc1af9291569ca70d7f7e56e9ecfa5f70223b8ab9d69f96f04116c
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4055d73ff874f5ec69daff4cf98907d9c3dd85aeebe2879ccbd3462a35733c55f344ea8ddec886e32ef1d324732c13b06

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee, My Faith Votes
subject: The stakes are high
body:
| | A faith-filled America is possible. And it begins with your gift today.
---
[ ](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/2017111602?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171116_eab_s1&n=1)
| Dear Peter, One of the primary reasons I was a Governor and why I ran for President was to help restore the Judeo-Christian values that made America great. Right now, they are in decline and facing a full-on assault.

**While I no longer hold public office, I’m continuing with this mission to see Judeo-Christian values upheld by serving as the Honorary National Chairman of** _**My Faith Votes**_**.**

**Our goal at** _**My Faith Votes**_**is simple – get the tens of millions of registered Christians who do not vote in elections to the polls in 2018.**

We face very serious challenges regarding our growing national debt and First Amendment rights of civil and religious liberty – just to name a few! But we don’t have to play defense. When Christians vote, our faith transforms the future. The problem is that millions of Christians have been silent for far too long while the progressive left has been motivated and active. They are stopping at nothing to resist our stances for religious freedom, traditional families, and sanctity of every human life. The overwhelming turnout for progressive candidates in the most recent elections just this past week should serve as warning signal to us. We know progressives spent hundreds of thousands of dollars in the Douglas County, Colorado School Board race. And the progressive left was also organized and determined in Virginia and New Jersey – spending millions of dollars to gain control of these states. This just means we need to step up our game. [It’s time to dramatically enhance voter participation amongst Christians, and we need your help. ](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/2017111602?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171116_eab_s1&n=2) **Your gift today to help reach a critical year-end goal of $500,000 will be doubled by a Matching Grant – so more Christians will be equipped and inspired to vote in 2018.** _My Faith Votes_ has a sound strategy in place, and their work made a significant impact on the 2016 Presidential election. Through aggressive social media promotion, a national church initiative, and leveraging national Christian leaders and broadcast media, we are working to inspire a non-partisan movement of believers to act on their faith by casting an informed vote. And now is as critical as ever. **Peter, I’m asking for your help because the stakes are high. Every single seat in the U.S. House of Representatives and 34 U.S. Senate seats are up for grabs in the 2018 midterm elections just around the corner!** | | [Donate Today ►](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/2017111602?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171116_eab_s1&n=3)
---
In a radio address from the White House in 1944, President Franklin D. Roosevelt said, “Nobody will ever deprive the American people of the right to vote except the American people themselves – and the only way they could do that is by not voting at all.”
President Roosevelt was exactly right. As Christians, let’s not deprive ourselves of the chance to shape the future for our children, our grandchildren and our nation by sitting on the sidelines.
So please make a tax-deductible gift right now, and a Matching Grant will double your gift!
Join us at My Faith Votes in this critical mission to inspire and activate millions of Christians before the 2018 Midterm elections.
Thank you for your time and generosity.
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171116_eab_s1&n=4)

name: The White House
subject: An Update from Sec. Mnuchin and Gary Cohn on Tax Reform
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b2a5e90b4104c5e6d31b5645419def9b85184ecbb0774671ab80d92ddb3fabe2ec8c73c26b04b21a500aa13913a253cd4b2cbdaeba746928

Dear 1600 Daily Readers,

Today, the House of Representatives passed the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, bringing us one step closer to giving hardworking Americans the relief they deserve. The Senate Finance Committee is also making progress on its companion bill, and we hope they will soon advance it to the floor for a vote.

The current tax code hurts American families, workers, and businesses. Our reforms will create a system in which they are treated fairly. Our workers will be able to keep more of their hard-earned money, and our companies will be able to create more jobs, raise wages, and successfully compete in the global marketplace. We will also bring back trillions of dollars in American wealth that is currently parked overseas—money that can be used to invest in America’s workers and American industry.

With these tax cuts—combined with the President's efforts to cut job-killing regulations—our country is poised for historic economic growth.

We will bring back our jobs, we will bring back our wealth, and as the President has said many times, we will bring back our great American dreams.

Stay informed on the fight for a fair and simple tax code at
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b2a5e90b4104c5e6db62a1f9c09e68cf31e8904ebd8b0acdbe3f33682a96219cc07b51ae3f6e22df62c685e7719c0c41eeee55938738fdfb
WhiteHouse.gov/TaxReform .

Steven Mnuchin

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: [JUST PASSED] A bill that raises taxes on millions of Americans >>
body:
Demand a fair tax plan from the GOP.
---
**House Republicans just voted yes on Trump's disastrous tax plan. Add your name to tell Congress to create a plan that works for every American:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-GOP-Tax-Plan1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171116_dnc3_nd&source=em_20171116_dnc3_nd")**
Derek --

House Republicans just passed their party's terrible tax plan -- a plan where nearly HALF of the tax breaks go to the top 1% of Americans.

Not only that, but nearly 1 in 4 middle-class families could see a tax increase in this plan. Really.

As Senate Republicans take up their bill, we need to be loud and clear that we expect a tax plan that helps all Americans, not just corporations, millionaires, and billionaires.

**[Demand a fair tax plan from Senate Republicans.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-GOP-Tax-Plan1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Demand+a+fair+tax+plan+from+Senate+Repub&utm_campaign=em_20171116_dnc3_nd&source=em_20171116_dnc3_nd")**

One of the craziest parts of the Republican bill is that it doesn't even help cut costs. According to the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office, this tax plan would increase the deficit by $1.7 trillion (!) and could trigger more than $25 billion in Medicare cuts.

But the Trump administration, Paul Ryan, and congressional Republicans don't care.

Their only concern is handing their friends and America's richest companies a huge gift. And they're peddling the same-old empty promise of trickle-down economics that has time and again been proven to be a failure.

The GOP can try and spin this bill all they want -- but here's the bottom line, Derek: This bill raises taxes on millions of middle-class Americans. And the Senate is now the only place we can stop it.

**Add your name now to make sure Senate Republicans get the message:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-GOP-Tax-Plan1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171116_dnc3_nd&source=em_20171116_dnc3_nd")**
Thanks,

DNC Rapid Response

name: Geri Prado, EMILY's List
subject: Plain old hard work
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6d37/24c69fd9/1674bbeda/189e0604/854473690/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEK32N_digital_email_20171116_HowWeWonVA_inact&source=WQEFEK32N_digital_email_20171116_HowWeWonVA_inact")
---

Peter,

Electing the first openly LGBTQ women, first Latinas, and first Asian American women to the Virginia House of Delegates last week -- all of them first-time candidates -- wasn't an accident.

It was the result of months of hard work -- from recruiting top-tier candidates and hosting in-state trainings to working with dozens of partners to get voters to the polls.

With your support, Peter, we're going to repeat that process again and again over the next year so we help even more women win at the state and local level.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women continue to win state and local races.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6d37/24c69fd9/1674bbeda/189e0605/854473690/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171115_email_HowWeWonVA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFEK32N_digital_email_20171116_HowWeWonVA_inact&source=WQEFEK32N_digital_email_20171116_HowWeWonVA_inact")**

Our team got on the ground in Virginia back in January.

We started by recruiting stellar candidates -- women with unique backgrounds who were willing to give their all to win -- and supporting them through the primaries.

Since many of them were first-time candidates, we hosted a Run to Win training in July to give them more tools to build strong campaigns for the general election.

And we had a dedicated advisor (part of the tripling of our state and local staff this year) who was there to support their campaigns.

What some would call a wave is really plain old hard work. And if we keep it up, there will be even more to celebrate next year.

**Donate $3 to help recruit and train top-tier candidates for next year's state and local races:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Keep-Winning-Local-Races](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6d37/24c69fd9/1674bbeda/189e0606/854473690/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171115_email_HowWeWonVA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgKeepWinningLocal&utm_campaign=WQEFEK32N_digital_email_20171116_HowWeWonVA_inact&source=WQEFEK32N_digital_email_20171116_HowWeWonVA_inact")**

Thanks,

Geri Prado

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Your help is needed
body:
We are reaching a point of no return for humanity and climate disruption has become the defining challenge
#
Friends,
We just recently learned that human-caused carbon-dioxide emissions have increased again. In 2017, global emissions of CO2 from fossil fuels and industry will once again rise by 2 percent, scientists project, to a record 37 billion metric tons. We are reaching a point of no return for humanity and climate disruption has become the defining challenge of our era. If we fail to act, it will be devastating.
I believe we can overcome it together, as we have so many other challenges before. That's why I have worked with Senator Sanders and other Senate colleagues on legislation that ensures we transition to 100% clean and renewable energy.
This is also where you come in. We need progressive organizers on the ground finding ways to build a movement to solve climate disruption. It is only through your hard work getting more people involved that we can truly recognize a clean energy future. Your work urging other legislators, and others who are running for office, to make climate disruption a top priority is critical.
[**Will you join me in supporting Our Revolution in building a grassroots army to combat climate disruption? Your support is needed today.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae60/bed43eb/2e80aeab/75ff5197/2968555172/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/act-on-climate?refcode=em171116-s&noskip=true")
American ingenuity can stave off disaster, create new jobs, end our dependence on fossil fuels, and conquer the challenge of climate disruption. If we work together to take action, we can transition our country away from fossil fuels and turn back the tide on climate disruption. We have plenty of work to do--but with your support, we can make it happen.
[**Contribute to Our Revolution and help build the grassroots support we need to make climate change the top issue in 2018.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae60/bed43eb/2e80aeab/75ff5197/2968555172/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/act-on-climate?refcode=em171116-s&noskip=true")
We must do all that we can to protect our planet. Thank you for all that you do.
In solidarity,
Sen. Jeff Merkley

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Hundreds of thousands more votes
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

We automatically register eligible Americans for the draft when they
turn 18. Shouldn’t we automatically register eligible Americans to
vote, too?

Well, that’s why Senator Amy Klobuchar just introduced the Register
America to Vote Act. This new bill would work hand in hand with the
other bills Congress is already considering to automatically register
folks to vote or update their registration whenever they update their
information with a federal agency.

Thousands of Legit members have already stepped forward to tell
Congress to support automatic voter registration. But with less than a
year until the general election, we need to keep building momentum
now.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/congress-avr-automatic-voter-registration-petition/?t=1002&akid=404%2E356062%2EggMrNw ]Sign LegitAction’s petition now. Urge members of Congress to
support automatic voter registration and get more people participating
in elections.

Automatic voter registration (AVR) improves democratic legitimacy by
increasing the number of people who participate in elections.

When Oregon adopted a statewide AVR law in 2015, it provided an
incredible boost to participation in 2016. Hundreds of thousands of
people cast ballots for the first time.

Now other states like Massachusetts are considering AVR too, because
AVR is also cheaper and less error-prone than the current paper
process. And AVR would clean up existing voter rolls and reduce the
potential for phony voter roll purges and other shady efforts at
disenfranchisement.

With Congress now considering bills to automate ever more of our voter
registration process, we need to expand our show of support for the
sake of democratic legitimacy.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/congress-avr-automatic-voter-registration-petition/?t=1003&akid=404%2E356062%2EggMrNw ]Urge members of Congress to support automatic voter registration
for the sake of democratic legitimacy. Sign the petition today.

Automatic voter registration is a simple and effective way to improve
accessibility to the ballot and strengthen our democracy. It’s up to
us to push Congress to modernize our outdated electoral system.

Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold
LegitAction

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/congress-avr-automatic-voter-registration-petition/?t=1004&akid=404%2E356062%2EggMrNw ]TAKE ACTION »

**_Los Angeles Times: Trump heads to Capitol Hill as House GOP set to pass tax plan_**
Team,

Donald Trump isn't leaving anything to chance.

**The House JUST voted** to pass their awful plan to raise taxes on middle class families -- right after Trump personally headed to Capitol Hill to arm-twist Republicans into voting for this disastrous bill.

And now, this bill is headed straight to the Senate. We know Trump will pressure GOP Senators into backing it, just as he did in the House -- which makes our Democratic Senators our last, best line of defense.

The Republican tax plan sabotages Obamacare and hikes up taxes for the middle class -- while giving _massive_ tax breaks to the top 1% -- and Senate Democrats are counting on our grassroots support to stop it.

[**No working family should pay more for taxes and health care to give the wealthiest a tax break. Respond to today 's House vote by signing on NOW to oppose the GOP tax scam.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d331/2b07114c/c86639bf/7317753a/4134252113/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-GOP-tax-plan?source=PT-20171116-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

And the fact that he's successfully lobbied to have the tax bill turned into a bill that repeals a critical part of Obamacare? Well, there's a reason he went to lobby the GOP in person today.

**We have got to show the GOP there will be consequences for backing Trump 's plan. Add your name now to say you'll be fighting the GOP tax scam with everything you've got:**

Team DSCC

They can see how unpopular Trump and their policies are and how hungry voters are to elect progressive champions -- like the pro-choice Democratic women we're recruiting and endorsing.
